act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Persons liable to pay value added tax.—Every person specified below

sub_sections.text: in relation to taxable import: the importer;
in relation to any taxable supply in Bangladesh: the supplier;

in relation to any taxable supply of imported service: the recipient of
such supply;

in relation to any sale, in the prescribed manner, of any good by an
auctioneer on behalf of a registered person: the auctioneer.
